params.name: L'Art de la Guerre
params.source: Minion Sim Choice Pack in Star Chart Shop
params.description:
On Sept 28, 1838 AD, the book L'Art de la Guerre (Introduction to the Art of War) was officially published.
This book is the work of the Swedish military scientist Antoine. It's mainly divided into 7 chapters and 47 sections, which summarize the experience of the French Revolutionary War and the Napoleon War, and formulates some advanced methods and forms of war. The author synthesizes the principles and theories of war, clarifies the composition of war art, promotes the formation and develop …
